full_text:
Shisun Rui (Junrong) 士孫瑞 (君榮)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Shisun Rui (士孫瑞), styledJunrong (君榮), was born in Youfufeng. Urged Wang Yun to action but claimed no credit so was spared when city fell. Shisun Rui was affiliated with the Han Dynasty. Shisun Rui lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
